arts.ttl: Live Blog: Newcastle v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace head north once again, for the second time in five days, to take on Carabao Cup winners Newcastle United (19:30 BST). Follow all the action from St. James' Park in our live blog below!

arts.ttl: Sources: Newcastle still keen on Serie A defender likened to Sergio Ramos as Tottenham also circling
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Newcastle United are still keen on AC Milan defender Malick Thiaw, but Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United are...

arts.ttl: Why Sandro Tonali joining Juventus from Newcastle IS possible
arts.sum: Gazzetta dello Sport and Tuttosport are just two of the big media outlets that confirm that Juventus want to sign Tonali this summer. Why Sandro Tonali joining Juventus from Newcastle IS possible

arts.ttl: Newcastle United star Tino Livramento slammed by bizarre pundit - 'what's he good at?' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Livramento was axed from the 23-man matchday squad by Tuchel for the game against Latvia, but has continued to impress with his attacking play on the wrong flank to where he is most comfortable. Anthony Gordon stepped of the bench late on for his first appearance since injuring his hip while playing for England, while the third England star in the squad for that game against Albania, Tino Livramento, produced a typically energetic performance at left-back.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's summer transfer plan one step ahead in the battle against PSR
arts.sum: Newcastle United know they can take a huge step towards Champions League football with a win against Crystal Palace this evening at St. James' Park. After excelling on loan with PSV last season, the Gambian looked the most likely to break into Howe's squad for the current campaign.

arts.ttl: 'I'm struggling' - Newcastle United Champions League verdict clear after Man United rout - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: The club host Crystal Palace on Wednesday (April 16) hoping to make it five straight league wins but will have to do so without manager Eddie Howe in the dugout as he is treated in hospital for pneumonia . Former Chelsea and Everton winger Pat Nevin has heaped praise on Newcastle as the Toon continue their bid to return to Champions League football next season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United offered 28-goal star amid Steve Nickson's Morocco visit
arts.sum: Newcastle United's head of recruitment Steve Nickson is rubbing shoulders with talent spotters from top clubs in Europe this week at the Under-17 African Cup of Nations tournament in Morocco. Head Newcastle scout Steve Nickson is a regular visitor to Atalanta and needs no reminders of Retegui's capabilities.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Newcastle United star on radar ahead of summer window?
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly giving consideration to making an approach for one of Newcastle United's star players during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers join race to sign Crystal Palace man who is high in demand
arts.sum: Crystal Palace players are high in demand ahead of the summer transfer window. Eberechi Eze could be on his way out of the club after Manchester United are showing serious interest in signing him this summer. Along with Eze, centre-back Marc Guehi, who has been the club’s most consistent performer for a very long time, […] The post Celtic and Rangers join race to sign Crystal Palace man who is high in demand appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Juventus keen on offering Douglas Luiz in move for Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus are keen on signing Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali and are willing to offer Douglas Luiz in a deal. Daniele Longo has reported today that Newcastle United…
